name: io.github.Harusame64/desktop-touch-mcp
description: Windows 11 desktop automation MCP server (56 tools). Covers Win32 window control, UIA named-element clicking, CDP/Chrome browser automation, mouse/keyboard input, screenshot, scroll, and reactive perception guards. Windows 11 x64 only. Launched via npx — downloads the prebuilt runtime from GitHub Releases on first run.

environment_variables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_AUTO_GUARD
environment_variables.description: Set to '0' to disable automatic action guards and revert to v0.11.12 semantics.

environment_variables.name: DESKTOP_TOUCH_PERCEPTION_RESOURCES
environment_variables.description: Set to '1' to enable MCP perception resources (perception://lens/... and perception://target/.../timeline).
